SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-25-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON. DEFENDANT ELLEN MARTIN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED CHECK FROM DEFENDANT AND REQUESTS CONTINUANCE TO ENSURE THE CHECK GOES THROUGH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ANGELA COOPER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTIOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANGELA COOPER. DEFENDANT ELLEN MARTIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
